creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looking at my firewall's output (I didn't look closely) but what I see is with -6 it correctly removed IPv4. It did list all rules that didn't specify family inet or were inet6. Based on my cursory look I see it's working properly.

Looking at your output, with rule numbers and hit counts removed as they have obviously confused our view):

slippy$ diff -u 4 6
--- 4	2020-07-13 09:52:58.296696000 -0700
+++ 6	2020-07-13 09:53:19.872361000 -0700
@@ -11,4 +11,5 @@
 pass in quick on bridge0 all
 pass in quick on lo0 all
 block in quick on re0 proto icmp from any to any
+pass in log quick inet6 proto ipv6-icmp from any to any
 block in quick on re0 all
slippy$
